channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Impeachment Pre-Trial Against VP Sara Duterte Nears Completion Ahead of July 6 Senate Trial
item.description: The pre-trial conference for the impeachment case against Vice President Sara Duterte is expected to conclude on June 22 or June 23, according to House prosecutor Chel Diokno. The pre-trial process, w...

item.title: China, Bhutan, and the Strategic Dispute Over the Doklam Plateau
item.description: The article examines the complex geopolitical relationship between Bhutan, China, and India, focusing on an ongoing border dispute that has strategic implications for the region. Bhutan is a small Him...

item.title: Everyday Life in 1970s Cuba Through Rare Documentary Photography
item.description: This article explores everyday life in Cuba during the 1970s through a collection of rare photographs taken by photographer Manel Armengol in 1976, primarily in cities such as Matanzas, Santa Clara, T...

item.title: A Monitoring Misconfiguration Nearly Rebooted a Healthy VPS: Lessons on Reliability and Failure Detection
item.description: The article describes a real-world incident experienced by the author while managing a small side project hosted on a free-tier virtual private server with only 1 GB of memory and a single CPU core. T...

item.title: Opinion Piece Questions Thabo Mbeki’s Criticism of Anti-Immigrant Sentiment in Light of His Political Legacy
item.description: This opinion article argues that former South African president Thabo Mbeki’s recent intervention in the national debate over immigration and anti-immigrant sentiment should be viewed critically in li...

item.title: Jayne Mansfield's 1957 Entertainment Tour of U.S. Military Bases in South Korea
item.description: The article revisits a series of photographs and historical accounts documenting actress Jayne Mansfield’s visit to Camp Casey and other U.S. military installations in South Korea during late 1957. At...

item.title: National Guard Presence at Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool Draws Public Criticism and Online Mockery
item.description: A video showing National Guard personnel stationed around the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool in Washington, D.C., sparked widespread criticism and ridicule on social media. The deployment comes amid...

item.title: Albanese backs one-month extension of reduced fuel excise amid ongoing Middle East uncertainty
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has defended the federal government's decision to extend fuel price relief for Australian motorists, announcing that the fuel excise reduction will continue through Jul...

item.title: Anthony Scaramucci Highlights Trump's Past Remarks About Discrediting the Press
item.description: Former White House communications director Anthony Scaramucci renewed criticism of President Donald Trump by drawing attention to a past exchange between Trump and journalist Lesley Stahl of CBS's '60...

item.title: Caviar unveils luxury magnetic rear panel accessories for iPhone 17 Pro Max featuring exotic materials
item.description: Luxury customization brand Caviar has introduced a new line of premium magnetic rear panel accessories designed for the iPhone 17 Pro Max. Rather than replacing the entire device, these add-ons attach...

item.title: Adam Kinzinger Claims Reflecting Pool Damage Was Caused by Maintenance Chemicals Rather Than Sabotage
item.description: A dispute has emerged over the cause of damage to the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool after former Republican Congressman Adam Kinzinger challenged claims that the deterioration was the result of pol...

item.title: Rare Behind-the-Scenes Photos Highlight Nicole Kidman’s Breakthrough Performance in Dead Calm (1989)
item.description: The article showcases 26 behind-the-scenes photographs of Nicole Kidman during the production of the 1989 psychological thriller 'Dead Calm,' a film widely regarded as a turning point in her career. A...

item.title: FSSAI intensifies scrutiny of health and nutrition claims on food and nutraceutical products
item.description: India's food regulator, the Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI), has stepped up its examination of food and nutraceutical products that use marketing claims such as 'natural', 'health...

item.title: AU Condemns Niger Airport Attack as Zimbabwe, Ethiopia and Nigeria Face Major Political Developments
item.description: This edition of AllAfrica's continental news roundup highlights major political, security and governance developments across Africa. The African Union condemned an armed attack on Diori Hamani Interna...

item.title: Larry Sabato Says Republican Prospects Depend on Improving Trump's Standing With Independent Voters
item.description: Political analyst Larry Sabato, director of the University of Virginia Center for Politics and editor of the Crystal Ball newsletter, argued during an MSNBC appearance that Donald Trump continues to d...

item.title: Trump Claims Additional Arrests and Expanded Damage Allegations in Reflecting Pool Investigation
item.description: President Donald Trump stated in a Truth Social post that additional people have been arrested in connection with alleged vandalism at the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool in Washington, D.C. Accordin...

item.title: Iran announces closure of Strait of Hormuz in response to renewed fighting in Lebanon amid US-Iran talks
item.description: In a significant escalation affecting global energy markets, Iran has announced the closure of the Strait of Hormuz following renewed clashes in Lebanon between Israel and Hezbollah forces. The move c...

item.title: Book Reports Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent Privately Compared Trump to George Soros and Criticized Zelenskyy
item.description: A forthcoming book titled 'Regime Change,' written by New York Times reporters Maggie Haberman and Jonathan Swan, reportedly contains several revelations about Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent's priva...

item.title: Opinion: Mark Kenny argues populist right-wing movements are showing signs of political weakness in Australia, the US and the UK
item.description: In this opinion piece, political analyst Mark Kenny argues that anti-establishment and populist movements across several Western democracies are beginning to show significant weaknesses. He contends t...

item.title: Philippines and United States Conclude Fourth Maritime Cooperative Activity in the West Philippine Sea for 2026
item.description: The Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) and the United States military have successfully completed their fourth Maritime Cooperative Activity (MCA) in the West Philippine Sea this year, reinforcing ...
